description: CompositionWhite and yellow shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a checked yoke, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full front buttoned placket and a curved hemlineFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/embroideryDesigned in a balanced combination of blue, red and grey, this shirt from probase adds that extra bounce to your style. Feel light and comfortable in the cotton fabric and look casual with the curved hemline. Team it with chinos and casual boots.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and shoulders 18”
